CustomField.description: Pipeline_Type__c value that the board loads by default on app launch. Must exactly match a Pipeline_Stage__mdt.Pipeline_Type__c value. Users can switch pipelines if multiple are configured.
CustomField.helpText: Default pipeline to show on the board (e.g., Nonprofit, Enterprise). Must match a Pipeline_Stage__mdt.Pipeline_Type__c value.
CustomField.label: Default Pipeline
